heading: No private right of action
label: 14954 No private right of action
text: The Convention and this chapter shall not be construed to create a private right of action to seek administrative or judicial relief, except to the extent expressly provided in this chapter.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Intercountry Adoption Act of 2000, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 106–279114 Stat. 825section 14901 of this titleOct. 6, 2000
